title: Extracting Sentiment from Customer Reviews
scenario: A company wants to extract sentiment from customer reviews. The reviews include text with positive, negative, or neutral sentiment. The user wants to extract a JSON object with the sentiment analysis and the corresponding text.
constraints: Must handle multiple reviews with different sentiment
Must use a specific sentiment analysis library

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output accurately identifies the sentiment (positive, negative, or neutral)
Check if the output uses the specified sentiment analysis library
Check if the output length is within the specified limit (250 characters)
